# Operators — external

> **Purpose:** tier-scoped operator playbooks. Currently operators live flat at `../<name>.md` — this directory exists for future tier-scoped organization if volume grows.

Tier definitions per the canonical Growth Operator Directory:
- **tier-1-goats** — proven M+ methodology with structured curriculum available
- **tier-2-operators** — proven M+ with partial public methodology
- **tier-3-rising** — emerging operators, methodology partially inferable
- **tier-4-unsorted** — staging for operators before tier assignment
- **external** — operators not in Heuresis network but whose methodology is referenced

## Current flat operators

All 11 current operator files live at `../<name>.md` (flat). Tier-based subdirs are reserved for when the roster exceeds ~30 operators.

Cross-reference `../README.md` for the current roster.
